commit_scope: Route the newly promoted BML front-door endpoint families through public Traefik labels and guard the deploy canaries so BML-native handlers are actually reached in production.

commands: python3 - <<'PY' ... yaml.safe_load('deploy/kernel-router/docker-compose.kernel-router.yml') and assert new BML Traefik label keys ... PY
local_validation.notes: The previous BML handler commit deployed the API SHA but public requests to /api/sensings and /api/translations/page/flow still returned X-Form-Router: fanout-python because the BML front-door service did not have Traefik labels for those paths. This follow-up adds labels for GET /api/sensings, GET /api/sensings/{sensing_id}, and GET /api/translations/{entity_type}/{entity_id}; extends the Hostinger local canary for sensings and translations; and extends the public deploy verifier so future deploy verification fails if these promoted routes are not publicly native.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR creation, hosted checks, merge, and production deploy verification.

deploy_validation.notes: Public pre-fix smoke on merged 767a80ad showed the new BML handlers were compiled but not publicly routed: /api/sensings?limit=2 and /api/translations/page/flow returned X-Form-Router: fanout-python. This commit is the route-overlay repair; post-merge proof must show native-kernel headers on the same public paths.

phase_gate.reason: Local routing proof passed; hosted checks, merge, and post-deploy public native header proof remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: After deployment, public GET /api/sensings, GET /api/sensings/{sensing_id}, and GET /api/translations/{entity_type}/{entity_id} should route to coherence-api-kernel-bml-front-door and return BML native proof headers instead of fanout-python.
e2e_validation.proof: Static deploy guard validates the three Traefik label rules and handler proof declarations; public deploy verifier now probes sensings and translation entity reads for X-Form-Router:native-kernel, X-Form-Handler, and X-Form-Python-Authority:false.
test_flows: Static Hostinger deploy-path test fails if any new BML route label is removed.
Hostinger local canary fails if sensings or translations do not execute inside kernel-router-bml-front-door.
Public deploy verifier fails if sensings or translations fall back to Python after deploy.

evidence_refs: deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh now probes api_sensings and api_translations_entity inside the BML front-door service.
scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh now requires native proof headers on public sensings and translation entity reads.
scripts/test_hostinger_deploy_form_paths.sh guards the new labels and native proof handlers.
